creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
It appears you are depending on a lib that isn't in the ports tree. 
 first you are pointing to /usr/ports/devel/sdl which doesn't exist, and 
then we only have sdl10 and 12.  If you can fix these problems I'll look 
at it further.  Try running portlint -a -b -c against it, I think 
there's another warning.  I look forward to testing it.
